title: Via, Et Veritas, Et Vita
content:
"You never attained to Him?" "If to attain
        Be to abide, then that may be."
    "Endless the way, followed with how much pain!"
         "The way was He."
meaning:
Alice Christiana Thompson Meynell's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Via, Et Veritas, Et Vita"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
